tasks.title: Represent a song with an optional notation asset
acceptance_criteria: The Song contract can point to a MusicXML source without changing existing song behavior.
The new song preserves the approved 86-measure neutral form and beat-positioned chord changes.
Uncertainty notes identify the automated melody, reference-guided harmony, missing lyrics, and generated accompaniment.
done_definition: The new song data typechecks and existing songs remain valid.
The MusicXML and MIDI artifacts are available as static app assets.

tasks.title: Publish 그대 내게 다시 in the Songs library
acceptance_criteria: The Songs index includes 그대 내게 다시 by 변진섭.
The detail route uses a stable song ID and carries all ten form sections.
List metadata counts the new sections and score systems consistently.
done_definition: The song is discoverable from /songs and resolves at its detail route.
No existing song entry is modified or removed.

tasks.title: Load MusicXML through the existing alphaTab surface
acceptance_criteria: Songs with a notation asset load it through alphaTab while legacy chord-only songs keep the AlphaTex path.
Full-score rests and part names are not suppressed by chord-chart-only presentation rules.
Loading and error states continue to be visible and accessible.
The implementation follows existing Next.js client boundaries and current shadcn/Tailwind/Geist conventions without new global theme variables.
done_definition: The generated melody, piano right hand, piano left hand, and chord symbols render in the browser.

epics.title: Verify score publication and LAN access

tasks.title: Run repository and score checks
acceptance_criteria: Lint, TypeScript, production build, and Supervisor artifact validation pass.
The copied MusicXML parses and the MIDI duration remains aligned with the source audio.
done_definition: All applicable deterministic checks have recorded exit status.

tasks.title: Verify list, detail, responsive fit, and IP binding
acceptance_criteria: Browser evidence exists before and after the change for desktop and mobile Songs surfaces.
Representative score systems render without avoidable horizontal clipping, redundant local labels, or framework error overlays.
A server bound to 0.0.0.0 responds through both loopback and the machine LAN IP.
done_definition: Screenshot-backed visual checks are recorded in verify.json.
The LAN URL is reported to the user.

assumptions: The completed audio-to-score run is the authoritative source for form, harmony, MusicXML, and MIDI.
The current alphaTab renderer can import MusicXML by URL through AlphaTabApi.load.
This is a product music surface, so the music-visual-instrument design register applies while existing page composition remains unchanged.
IP access means local-network access to the development server, not a public production deployment.
risks: alphaTab may interpret the generated MusicXML differently from a desktop notation editor.
The 86-measure three-part score may require responsive scaling to avoid clipping on narrow screens.
The automatic melody remains a draft even when the file renders correctly.
LAN access can still be blocked by the host firewall or client network isolation.
